sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 17.86 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.17)

statement.latex: (Simplest questions related to the Whitehead asphericity conjecture). Let$x_1,x_2,x_3 r_1,r_2,r_3$be a presentation of the trivial group. [r]{a)} Prove that the group$x_1,x_2,x_3 r_1,r_2$is torsion-free. { R.\,Mikhailov}
